name: Lebanese Style Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop scallions and parsley.
2. Add the chopped herbs to a large bowl containing the cubed potatoes.
3. Mash the garlic with a fork until it becomes smooth.
4. Add the mashed garlic and salt to the lemon juice, oil, and safflower or semolina paste.
5. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
6. Pour the dressing over the potato salad and mix thoroughly.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
8. If desired, sprinkle some simaq (a spice blend) over the top for added flavor.
